claims.value: Oversight model: Senate sets budget and confirms the Chief Marshal; Chief Marshal reports to the Judicial Council, not the Chancellor; Chancellor appoints the Chief Marshal with Senate approval and cannot issue orders in criminal investigations; chain of command independent of military and planetary police.
